notes: New: Rival Captains (opt-in, Custom Start) - 2-4 AI captains enter the sector over the run (cycle 50/100/150/200), each pursuing their own agenda: trading (visibly moving prices you'll notice), lobbying their patron faction against you, racing you for a couple of unclaimed colonizable worlds, and hunting you down on the jump lanes once you're Wanted enough to be worth the trouble. Surfaces through toasts, the Contacts tab's new Rivals sub-view, and occasional attribution during raids and convoy ambushes.
